sql:
SELECT
            src_ip,
            src_nren_id,
            CASE
                WHEN src_nren_name IS NULL OR src_nren_name = '' THEN '기타'
                ELSE src_nren_name
            END AS src_nren_name,
            src_country_code,
            dst_ip,
            dst_nren_id,
            CASE
                WHEN dst_nren_name IS NULL OR dst_nren_name = '' THEN '기타'
                ELSE dst_nren_name
        END AS dst_nren_name,
            dst_country_code,
            packet_bytes,
            row_num
        FROM (
            SELECT
                src_ip,
                src_nren_id,
                src_nren_name,
                src_country_code,
                dst_ip,
                dst_nren_id,
                dst_nren_name,
                dst_country_code,
                SUM(packet_bytes) AS packet_bytes,
                row_number() OVER (
                    ORDER BY
                        SUM(packet_bytes) desc,
                        CASE
                            WHEN src_nren_id IS NULL AND dst_nren_id IS NULL THEN 0
                            ELSE 2
                        END desc
                ) AS row_num
            FROM
                gather.tb_mdb_sflow_traffic_day dt
            WHERE
                1=1
                AND dt.collect_timestamp   <=   CURRENT_DATE
                AND dt.collect_timestamp   >=   CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '5 days'
                    AND src_nren_id = 'seoul-5812_xe30'
            GROUP BY
                src_ip,
                src_nren_id,
                src_nren_name,
                src_country_code,
                dst_ip,
                dst_nren_id,
                dst_nren_name,
                dst_country_code
        ) AS subquery
        WHERE 1=1
                AND row_num   <   101
            LIMIT 50 OFFSET 0
